remember: Students will be able to recall and identify different types of marketing management, marketing environment, and marketing mix.
Students will be able to define and explain the concept of marketing management and its importance.
Students will be able to list and describe the steps involved in the marketing management process.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role and functions of marketing management in an organization.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of marketing environment on marketing management decisions.
Students will be able to explain the concept of marketing mix and its components.
apply: Students will be able to apply the marketing mix elements to develop a marketing strategy for a product or service.
Students will be able to use marketing management concepts to solve problems in real-life business scenarios.
Students will be able to design a marketing plan for a new product or service launch.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of marketing strategies and their impact on the organization's performance.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of marketing environment on marketing management decisions and suggest alternatives.
Students will be able to analyze the role of marketing management in achieving organizational objectives.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the concept of marketing management and its importance in an organization.
To explain the marketing management process and its stages.
To analyze the marketing environment and its impact on marketing management decisions.
To understand the concept of marketing mix and its components.
To apply the marketing mix elements to develop a marketing strategy for a product or service.
board_exam_objectives: To define and explain the concept of marketing management and its importance.
To describe the marketing management process and its stages.
To analyze the marketing environment and its impact on marketing management decisions.
To explain the marketing mix and its components.
To develop a marketing strategy using the marketing mix elements.
